wp_remote_get( $file_url, array(
				'filename' => $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/addtoany/' . $file_name,
				'stream'   => true, // Required to use `filename` arg.
			) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of posts', 'add-to-any' ), _a2a_position_in_content( $options, true ) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of posts on the front page', 'add-to-any' ), _a2a_position_in_content( $options ) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of posts on archive pages', 'add-to-any' ), _a2a_position_in_content( $options ) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of posts in the feed', 'add-to-any' ), _a2a_position_in_content( $options ) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of excerpts' , 'add-to-any'), _a2a_position_in_content( $options, false ) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of pages', 'add-to-any' ), _a2a_position_in_content( $options, false ) )
printf( __( 'Display at the %s of media pages', 'add-to-any' ), _a2a_position_in_content( $options, false ) )
printf(esc_html__( 'Enter a %1$sCSS selector%2$s, or group of selectors, that match the HTML element you want to attach to.', 'add-to-any' ),'','')
